ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "cds_code" TEXT /* CDS (County-District-School) code for the district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of district */,
  "sector_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector type of the district */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the district record was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the district */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the district */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the district */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was founded */,
  "superintendent" TEXT /* Name of the district's superintendent */,
  "is_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the district includes charter schools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_sector_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_type_id") REFERENCES sector_types ("sector_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_district_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_type_id") REFERENCES district_types ("district_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_types" (
  "district_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district type */,
  "district_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the district type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district type */,
  "is_combined" INTEGER /* Indicates if the district type includes both elementary and secondary education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_types" (
  "sector_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector type */,
  "sector_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is the default status for new districts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the district information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the district information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_statuses" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district whose status changed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status change event was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_statuses_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_statuses_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)
